def wait_for(self, locator, timeout=None): """ Waits for an element to be visible using the passed in locator.
:param locator: Locator tuple for the element :param timeout: (Int) Number of seconds to wait for an element :return: WebElement if it is visible """ timeout = timeout or settings.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT

self = <selenium.webdriver.support.wait.WebDriverWait (session="e5934fd0edcbecdb2915ecf3f27e1bcd")> method = <function visibility_of_element_located.<locals>._predicate at 0x7fb92970aca0> message = ''
def until(self, method: Callable[[D], Union[Literal[False], T]], message: str = "") -> T: """Wait until the method returns a value that is not False.
Calls the method provided with the driver as an argument until the return value does not evaluate to ``False``.
Parameters: ----------- method: callable(WebDriver) - A callable object that takes a WebDriver instance as an argument.
message: str - Optional message for :exc:`TimeoutException`
Return: ------- object: T - The result of the last call to `method`
Raises: ------- TimeoutException - If 'method' does not return a truthy value within the WebDriverWait object's timeout
Example: -------- >>> from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By >>> from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait >>> from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
# Wait until an element is visible on the page >>> wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10) >>> element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "exampleId"))) >>> print(element.text) """ screen = None stacktrace = None
end_time = time.monotonic() + self._timeout while True: try: value = method(self._driver) if value: return value except self._ignored_exceptions as exc: screen = getattr(exc, "screen", None) stacktrace = getattr(exc, "stacktrace", None) if time.monotonic() > end_time: break time.sleep(self._poll) > raise TimeoutException(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: E Stacktrace: E Symbols not available. Dumping unresolved backtrace: E 0x1087d13 E 0x1087d54 E 0xeab290 E 0xef56ea E 0xef598b E 0xf37912 E 0xf18004 E 0xf35111 E 0xf17d56 E 0xee94d9 E 0xeea294 E 0x12fbb64 E 0x12f7215 E 0x1313fad E 0x10a1ef8 E 0x10a9b0d E 0x1090738 E 0x1090902 E 0x107a1da E 0x770c5d49 E 0x77aacebb E 0x77aace41
end_time = 62106698.10036413 message = '' method = <function visibility_of_element_located.<locals>._predicate at 0x7fb92970aca0> screen = None self = <selenium.webdriver.support.wait.WebDriverWait (session="e5934fd0edcbecdb2915ecf3f27e1bcd")> stacktrace = ['Symbols not available. self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fb92a599f40> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fb929f43140>
def test_evite_rsvp_premium(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(_test_name) psql_db = PostgreSQL(_test_name)
# Logger logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(_test_name) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav("create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(["premium"])
# Pick up a random template from the template page evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(premium=True)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(test_name=_test_name) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time(premium=True) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="details")
# Step 2: Enter Details page step2_event_details.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="gifting") step1_template.select_next(url="preview")
step1_template.select_next(url="guests") > step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"])
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_premium' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fb929f43140> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7fb929f42420> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7fb929f41be0> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7fb929f43e90> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_premium (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fb929f42e70> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7fb929f42000> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fb929f404d0> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7fb929f137d0> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7fb929f11f40> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7fb929f41010> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fb92a599f40> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7fb929f42c00> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7fb929f401a0> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7fb929f41490> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7fb929f41880> user_email_addr = 'evite-02172026-094452-08-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7fb929f404a0>

:param locator: Locator tuple for the element :param timeout: (Int) Number of seconds to wait for an element :return: WebElement if it is visible """ timeout = timeout or settings.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT

testcase.name: test_evite_sus_one_day_create

failure.message: AssertionError: Fail verify name, expecting evite-volunteer-20260217-0945-633405-test, got

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7f456f37ba40> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f456f397290>
def test_evite_sus_one_day_create(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] sign_up_sheet_maker = config.pages["sign_up_sheet_maker"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info("Start %s", _test_name)
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sus_event_from_meganav(sus_event="one_day")
sign_up_sheet_maker.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.create_sheet_one_day(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.verify_sheet_sign_ups(test_data=self._json_test_data)
sign_up_sheet_maker.publish_sheet() shareable_link = sign_up_sheet_maker.copy_shareable_link()
login_modal.sign_out()
# Get Volunteer view to build SUS data config.driver.get(shareable_link) logger.info("Going volunteer url - %s", config.driver.current_url)
sign_up_sheet = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_sign_up_sheet_one_day()
volunteers = sign_up_sheet_maker.initialize_volunteers(volunteers=self._json_test_data["volunteers"])
for volunteer in volunteers:
if volunteer["registered"]: logger.info("Registering guest: %s", volunteer["name"])
# Change register data self._json_test_data["register"]["first_name"] = volunteer["name"] self._json_test_data["register"]["email"] = volunteer["email_addr"]
# Register login_modal.register(test_data=self._json_test_data["register"], existing_user=True)
sus_row = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_random_sus_row(sus=sign_up_sheet)
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sign_up(sus_row) > sign_up_sheet_maker.volunteer_sign_up(volunteer=volunteer)
_test_name = 'test_evite_sus_one_day_create' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f456f397290> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7f456f397f20> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_sus_one_day_create (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7f456f397890> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7f456f397c20> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7f456f3973b0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7f456f37ba40> shareable_link = 'https://test23.evite.me/HESAE6FRdt' sign_up_sheet = [{'row_count': 2, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'drinks'}, {'row_count': 5, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'chips'}, {'row_count': 10, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'food'}] sign_up_sheet_maker = <commons.pages.evite.sign_up_sheet_maker.SignUpSheetMaker object at 0x7f456f397980> sus_row = {'row_count': 10, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'food'} user_email_addr = 'evite-02172026-094456-64-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' volunteer = {'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260217-0945-633405-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 2, 'kids_count': 0, ...} volunteers = [{'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260217-0945-633405-test@evitetest.com', '...ENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260217-0945-633711-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 0, 'kids_count': 0, ...}]

def volunteer_sign_up(self, volunteer): self.logger.info("Start %s.%s", self.__class__.__name__, inspect.stack()[0][3])
if volunteer["comment"]: self.find_text_box_clear_enter_text(self._sign_up_comment, volunteer["comment"])
if volunteer["registered"]: # If registered, then Name and Email must be prepopulated already, verify and continue if self.is_element_visible(self._sign_up_name): web_name = self.find(self._sign_up_name).get_attribute("value") > assert volunteer["name"] in web_name, f"Fail verify name, expecting {volunteer['name']}, got {web_name}" E AssertionError: Fail verify name, expecting evite-volunteer-20260217-0945-633405-test, got

testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_free

self = config = def test_evite_rsvp_free(self, config): """ New Creation Flow with Fabric Templates Create Event, RSVP guests, Yes, No. Email and/or Phone. Verify guest in Guest List Verify RSVP in Manage Invitation Dashboard :param config: :return: """ _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3] quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3]) page = config.pages["page"] evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}") page.get_url(environment=config.environment) # Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data) # Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav(action="create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(actions=["free"]) evite_event_page = evite_gallery_page.select_random_template() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" ) # Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="details") # Step 2: Enter Details page step2_event_details.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="gifting") step1_template.select_next(url="preview") step1_template.select_next(url="send") evite_event_page.skip_ads() config.pages["evite_event_confirmation"].select_confirmation_button(action="add_guests") step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"]) step1_template.select_next(url="confirm") event_id = Utils.get_event_id_from_url(config.driver.current_url) # Get Event Details get_event_data = quake_v3_event.get_event_information( user_email_addr=user_email_addr, user_pass=user_pass, event_id=event_id ) login_modal.sign_out() guest_list = step5_guests.initialize_guest_list( test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"], get_event_data=get_event_data["guests"] ) # RSVP for each guest for guest in guest_list: if ( guest["guest_type"] == "host" or guest["test_data"]["rsvp"] == "undecided" or not guest["test_data"]["rsvp"] ): continue logger.info("Going guest view URL") page.get_url( environment=config.environment, sub_page_url=f"/event/{get_event_data['event']['id']}?gid={guest['guest_id']}", add_cookie=False, ) # Check if guest have to be registered if guest["test_data"]["registered"]: # Change register data self._json_test_data["register"]["first_name"] = guest["test_data"]["name"] self._json_test_data["register"]["email"] = guest["test_data"]["email_addr"] # Register > login_modal.register(test_data=self._json_test_data["register"], existing_user=True) _test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_free' config = event_details = event_id = '02E9IIAE4SKDAAYQEEPRBQUK4GI7PY' evite_event_page = evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page = get_event_data = {'current_user_rsvp': {'address': None, 'avatar_url': None, 'checked_in': True, 'comments': None, ...}, 'event': {'ama...ium_assets/fabric_gallery_asset/1769716436/composed_thumbnail_6478326944530432_default_800x600.webp', ...}}, ...}, ...} guest = {'avatar_url': None, 'checked_in': False, 'comments': None, 'date_created': '2026-02-17T17:48:27', ...} guest_list = [{'avatar_url': None, 'checked_in': True, 'comments': None, 'date_created': '2026-02-17T17:47:08', ...}, {'avatar_url'...:48:27', ...}, {'avatar_url': None, 'checked_in': False, 'comments': None, 'date_created': '2026-02-17T17:48:27', ...}] host = 'automation test' logger = login_modal = my_events = page = psql_db = quake_v3_event = rsvp_modal = self = step1_template = step2_event_details = step5_guests = user_email_addr = 'evite-02172026-094625-63-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = ...xb51ef8\\n\\t0xb59b0d\\n\\t0xb40738\\n\\t0xb40902\\n\\t0xb2a1da\\n\\t0x77425d49\\n\\t0x77becebb\\n\\t0x77bece41\\n"}}'} def check_response(self, response: dict[str, Any]) -> None: """Checks that a JSON response from the WebDriver does not have an error. :Args: - response - The JSON response from the WebDriver server as a dictionary object. :Raises: If the response contains an error message. """ status = response.get("status", None) if not status or status == ErrorCode.SUCCESS: return value = None message = response.get("message", "") screen: str = response.get("screen", "") stacktrace = None if isinstance(status, int): value_json = response.get("value", None) if value_json and isinstance(value_json, str): try: value = json.loads(value_json) if isinstance(value, dict): if len(value) == 1: value = value["value"] status = value.get("error", None) if not status: status = value.get("status", ErrorCode.UNKNOWN_ERROR) message = value.get("value") or value.get("message") if not isinstance(message, str): value = message message = message.get("message") else: message = value.get("message", None) except ValueError: pass exception_class: type[WebDriverException] e = ErrorCode() error_codes = [item for item in dir(e) if not item.startswith("__")] for error_code in error_codes: error_info = getattr(ErrorCode, error_code) if isinstance(error_info, list) and status in error_info: exception_class = getattr(ExceptionMapping, error_code, WebDriverException) break else: exception_class = WebDriverException if not value: value = response["value"] if isinstance(value, str): raise exception_class(value) if message == "" and "message" in value: message = value["message"] screen = None # type: ignore[assignment] if "screen" in value: screen = value["screen"] stacktrace = None st_value = value.get("stackTrace") or value.get("stacktrace") if st_value: if isinstance(st_value, str): stacktrace = st_value.split("\n") else: stacktrace = [] try: for frame in st_value: line = frame.get("lineNumber", "") file = frame.get("fileName", "") if line: file = f"{file}:{line}" meth = frame.get("methodName", "") if "className" in frame: meth = f"{frame['className']}.{meth}" msg = " at %s (%s)" msg = msg % (meth, file) stacktrace.append(msg) except TypeError: pass if exception_class == UnexpectedAlertPresentException: alert_text = None if "data" in value: alert_text = value["data"].get("text") elif "alert" in value: alert_text = value["alert"].get("text") raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace, alert_text) # type: ignore[call-arg] # mypy is not smart enough here > raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1831, 22).
